title: carpinus betulus subsp. carpinizza
intro: Carpinus betulus subsp. carpinizza, also known as the European hornbeam, is a subspecies of the hornbeam tree native to Europe and Western Asia. The bark and leaves of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carpinus betulus subsp. carpinizza include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are often made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to utilize their medicinal properties.
